assertions.description: The analyzer correctly identified USART_RX and USART_TX nets shared between U3 (STM32G081RBT6) and U4 (CP2102N-A02-GQFN24). This is the primary debug/programming UART between the MCU and the USB-to-serial bridge. The USB differential pair (USB_D+/USB_D-) detection with ESD protection (U2=USBLC6-2SC6, U4=CP2102N) is also correct.
